scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && cargo test -q --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.test:frontend: node test/frontend/package.test.mjs && node test/frontend/view.test.mjs && node test/frontend/theme.test.mjs && node test/frontend/recent.test.mjs && node test/frontend/shortcuts.test.mjs && node test/frontend/save-path.test.mjs
